calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-06-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Clara Salas was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor Lucas Woodcock Salas Amarante, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Felipe Amarante, the minor's father, was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Lucas Amarante.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-29-2008 Reset To May-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Petitioner: Clara Salas, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Lucas Woodcock Salas Amarante, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to May 6, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for an appearance of the Minor's Father.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
